title: CodeGrind: AI-assisted DSA practice gets UX and performance polish
summary: Highlighting recent dev focus: faster Phaser asset preloading, enhanced onboarding, and Azure OpenAI assistant improvements that elevate DSA practice.
core_message: CodeGrind is shipping focused improvements to AI-assisted problem solving, faster asset loading for smoother gameplay, and a refreshed onboarding flow. These updates reduce friction in practice sessions and make problem solving with AI more seamless, while keeping the tower-defense gamified concept intact.
cta: Explore the latest CodeGrind updates and try a new AI-assisted problem now.
visual_brief: Static renderer of a sleek CodeGrind dashboard showing AI chat panel alongside a fast-loading Phaser-based game view, with subtle cyberpunk accents and a badge saying 'AI Assistant Enhanced'.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
